name: Reflective Card
description: Card with mouse-tracking reflection overlay in glass (frosted blur + radial highlight) or metallic (iridescent angle shift) mode.
accessibility_notes: reflection is decorative — content inside remains accessible

type.description: Reflection style — glass uses frosted blur, metallic uses iridescent gradient

className.description: CSS class for the card container

conflicts: glass mode uses backdrop-filter — not supported in all browsers
mouse-dependent — no effect on touch devices
usage_tip: Best for premium pricing or product cards; desktop hover required.
